title: Citrusy Fermented Tunisian Orange Peel Stir-Fry
description: A dense and salty dish featuring fermented orange peel with orange blossom water and kosher-friendly seasoning, perfect for a decadent snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: Orange peel
ingredients.notes: Fermented and soaked in kosher salt

instructions: Wash the orange peel thoroughly and remove any tough membranes. Soak it in kosher salt water for at least 24 hours.
Combine fermented orange peel, garlic, cumin seeds, bay leaves, and a splash of orchid blossom water in a mixing bowl to infuse flavors.
Heat sesame oil in a wok or frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the infused mixture from the previous step into the hot pan.
Stir-fry until fragrant and slightly darkened, about 5-7 minutes. Season with more kosher salt if needed.
Serve warm as a snack or dessert accompaniment.
